## Task Description
Create an external CSS stylesheet and link it to index.html. Also include at least one example of inline CSS and one <style> tag.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] External CSS file created and linked
- [ ] At least one inline CSS example included
- [ ] At least one <style> tag example included
- [ ] Pushed via Pull Request
